---
title: "Statistical Models"
---

Model families I'm building working knowledge of for HEOR/RWE. Each entry follows the same structure: the model, the assumptions, when to use it, R code, diagnostics, and what tripped me up.

*Planned: Poisson regression, negative binomial, zero-inflated Poisson, **ZINB** (the anchor project model), hurdle models, GLMs for cost (gamma, log-link), Cox PH refresher in R, mixed models with `lme4`.*
